messages.text_or_caption: lake plan is becoming a whole production 😭
Sam is asking for a packing list PDF already
of course he is. PDF before personality
that blanket looks like it has survived three festivals
and it will survive Leo with snacks
Maya explains snack math for 18 seconds
I refuse to calculate snacks per person before coffee
sorry missed you, was brushing teeth
tragic. anyway I vote chips + fruit + one irresponsible cake
Nina might think she wasn't invited
oh no. add her before this becomes a documentary
why is that video just you pointing at a bag
because the bag contains the emergency snacks
I made a simple plan. Simple by my standards.
that means at least two tables
Three, but one is emotional support.
why does it have a risk column
Tiny correction: boat tickets are 14:20, not 14:40.
Please don't let Leo be in charge of timing.
Nina wasn't in the group yet. My bad.
Add her. The PDF has 6 people anyway.
the PDF knew before the group did
I updated the packing list section.
do we need a new PDF?
Final reminder: lake tickets, snacks, jacket, charger.
Wait, was everyone invited except me?
No no. I messed up the group invite.
I honestly thought it was a closed thing.
No, that's on me. I should've messaged you directly.
Okay but I was dramatic in my kitchen for like 12 minutes
yes. Samir already counted you in the PDF somehow
the PDF is kinder than the group chat
Okay, I'm coming if there's still cake.
I reserve the right to be dramatic for 10 minutes.
Yep. The one by the blue sign.
Office snacks chat is getting intense.
more intense than the lake ticket situation?
Are you doing something nice for your birthday weekend?
That sounds lovely. Don't forget a jacket near the lake.
I knew jacket would arrive by message
why was my haircut like that
Elena says happy early birthday and reminds Alex to eat properly
voice note received, food reminder accepted
Hey, still selling the spare ticket?
No worries. It's for the lake boat thing.
fake preview, not a real ticket
This is just the preview, not transferable yet.
All good. If it frees up, I can take it.
No stress, I might have another option
I'll tell you if it clears
Hello Alex, your picnic basket order is ready for pickup.
Great, thank you. Is pickup possible Friday afternoon?
Order status changed to ready for pickup
Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted. Synthetic demo notice.
Welcome to the extremely official lake weekend chat
Thanks. I only read PDFs under social pressure.
same but I respect the font choice
Main thing: lake, picnic, optional boat, tiny birthday cake
Ticket question: I counted five boat tickets.
I may have said I had one spare then forgot what spare means
Correction: boat ticket time is 14:20, not 14:40.
Synthetic meeting point for fixture only
not the actual lake but manifesting this energy
I can ruin the peace with snacks
you are not in charge of snacks
hello yes I have arrived from the forgotten dimension
public apology: I forgot to add Nina, not to invite Nina
Nina was already in the PDF headcount.
the PDF is the real organizer
I understood less after the voice note.
Summary: we still need one ticket confirmation.
I can skip the boat if needed, but not the cake
boat sign, if it uploads - Media missing
that photo may be missing on purpose for demo testing
Even the missing media has a test plan.
System note: family reminder exists in another chat
Alex's mom already sent that spiritually
Final packing list: water, jacket, charger, snacks, ticket.
Already messaging Jules about the ticket
This archive will be 40% ticket discussion.
Tomorrow check: 09:10 station, 14:20 boat, PDF has details
Snack poll: salty / sweet / fruit / mystery box
fruit, but I know this will lose
Current votes: salty 1, sweet 1, fruit 1, mystery 0
mystery box is how we lost trust last time
that was not a snack, that was a puzzle
Samir made a snacks PDF. History repeats.
why does prototype sound so serious
voice memo vote should count double
Please keep receipts if this uses the office budget.
